domain.selectDescription: Choose a subject map to start learning

comprehension.title: Comprehension Check
comprehension.description: Do you understand this concept? If so, mark it as understood and move on.
comprehension.alreadyCompleted: You have already completed this concept

policy.title: Site Policy
policy.aboutBody: study-route is a free educational web application for learning concepts across multiple domains including mathematics, philosophy, AWS, computer science, chemistry, and accounting. All learning content is generated by AI (Claude by Anthropic) and reviewed for accuracy.
policy.disclaimerBody: The content on this site is generated by AI and is intended for educational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee the correctness, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided. Users should verify important information with authoritative sources.
policy.disclaimerAccounting: For accounting content specifically: explanations are based on Japanese GAAP (J-GAAP) with references to IFRS where applicable. This content does not constitute professional accounting or tax advice.
policy.privacyBody: This site does not collect personal information. All learning progress and settings are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and are never transmitted to any server.
policy.licenseBody: The source code is available on GitHub. Generated content is provided as-is for educational use.
policy.contactBody: For bug reports or feature requests, please use the GitHub Issues page.
